---
title: "attachObserveEventLog()"
description: "Persist Graph.observe() events to an append log. This is a graph-bound adapter over passive storage frames, not graph restore or projection."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Persist Graph.observe() events to an append log. This is a graph-bound
adapter over passive storage frames, not graph restore or projection.

## Import

```ts
import { attachObserveEventLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/observe-storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function attachObserveEventLog(
	graph: Graph,
	log: AppendLogStorageTier<ObserveEventFrame<T>>,
	opts: AttachObserveEventLogOptions<T> = {},
): ObserveEventLogHandle
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes or projector. |
| `log` | `AppendLogStorageTier<ObserveEventFrame<T>>` | log value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `AttachObserveEventLogOptions<T>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `ObserveEventLogHandle` value.

## Example

```ts
import { attachObserveEventLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/observe-storage";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/observe-storage.ts`
